items.title: Jupiter taps Bitwise to curate institutional-grade Solana-based USDe lending market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jupiter's partnership with Bitwise enhances the credibility and appeal of Solana's USDe lending market, potentially attracting more institutional liquidity.

items.title: The Protocol: Solana’s ‘Alpenglow’ upgrade is live for testing
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of the 'Alpenglow' upgrade for testing indicates ongoing development in Solana's ecosystem, which may improve performance and user experience.

items.title: Upexi falls 8% after widened fiscal Q3 net loss
items.whyYouShouldCare: Upexi's significant fiscal loss could impact investor sentiment and confidence in related Solana projects, affecting overall ecosystem stability.
